notes: Scaffolding probe (task 0.3). Magic-DEPENDENT target for the 0.6 regeneration test: its bytes embed the 4-byte payload magic at magic_offset, routed through the tx_set adapter boundary. The surrounding bytes are filler and assert no layout. manifest_stub carries the hash of each pinned document these bytes depend on, which is what the 0.2 procedure scans to derive an invalidation set.
